```{r}
#| label: tbl-secondary-bsi-rates
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

tbl_data <- reference_data |>
  neoipcr::get_secondary_bsi_rate_table()

tbl <- tbl_data |>
  dplyr::rename(
    !!sR$table_headers$n := "n",
    !!sR$table_headers$pooled := "pooled",
    !!sR$table_headers$q1 := "q1",
    !!sR$table_headers$q2 := "q2",
    !!sR$table_headers$q3 := "q3") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Infection = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$event_type_key),
      "nec" ~ sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc,
      "ssi" ~ sR$surgical_site_infection_sc,
      "hap" ~ sR$pneumonia_sc),
    .keep = "unused")

if (include_ci) {
  tbl <- tbl |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$ci := "ci_lower",
      ci_upper_hide = "ci_upper")
} else {
  tbl <- tbl |>
    dplyr::select(!tidyselect::any_of(c(
      "ci_lower", "ci_upper",
      "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper",
      "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper",
      "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper")))
}

gt_tbl <- tbl |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Infection") |>
  sub_missing() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = 13,
    footnotes.marks = "extended"
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = !sR$table_headers$n,
    decimals = 1,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2,
    locale = locale_gt) |>
  fmt_integer(
    columns = sR$table_headers$n,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2)

if (include_ci) {
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    cols_merge(
      columns = c(sR$table_headers$ci, "ci_upper_hide"),
      pattern = "{1}\u2013{2}") |>
    cols_width(
      stub() ~ pct(20),
      sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(10),
      sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(10),
      sR$table_headers$ci ~ pct(15),
      sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(15),
      sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(15),
      sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(15))

  # Merge bootstrap CIs into quartile columns (parenthetical)
  if (all(c("q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper") %in% names(tbl))) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})") |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})") |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})")
  }
} else {
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    cols_width(
      stub() ~ pct(25),
      sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(15),
      sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(15),
      sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(15),
      sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(15),
      sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(15))
}

gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_name,
    columns = tidyselect::any_of(
      c(
        sR$table_headers$pooled,
        sR$table_headers$ci,
        sR$table_headers$q1,
        sR$table_headers$q2,
        sR$table_headers$q3)),
    id = "secondary_bsi_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels(),
      cells_row_groups()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_name,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_numerator,
        "}}{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_denominator,
        "}} \\times ",
        format_integer(100),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "secondary_bsi_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$n_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$n),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$pooled_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$pooled),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$quartile_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$q1,
      sR$table_headers$q2,
      sR$table_headers$q3,
      sprintf("%i%s", 25L, sR$percent_symbol),
      sprintf("%i%s", 50L, sR$percent_symbol),
      sprintf("%i%s", 75L, sR$percent_symbol)
    ),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(
      sR$table_headers$q1,
      sR$table_headers$q2,
      sR$table_headers$q3))) |>
  tab_source_note(source_note = sR$pooled_rate_note)

# Sparse-data footnote for N < 10
sparse_rows <- which(tbl_data$n < 10 & !is.na(tbl_data$n) & tbl_data$n > 0)
if (length(sparse_rows) > 0) {
  fn_text <- if (include_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = fn_text,
      locations = cells_body(
        columns = sR$table_headers$pooled,
        rows = sparse_rows))
}

gt_tbl
```
